title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Correctness Defense
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace rotations while preserving binary-search order and reconnecting every affected link.
Maintain AVL heights and select single or double rotations from imbalance shape.
Use red-black color properties to bound height and guide update repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
